Page URL: https://admin.example.com/customers/4521/profile
Page Title: Customer profile — Acme Admin

```yaml
- generic [ref=root]:
  - heading "Customer profile" [level=1]
  - section "Personal details":
    - row:
      - text: "Full name"
      - text: "Jane Q. Customer"
    - row:
      - text: "Date of birth"
      - text: "DOB: 1985-04-12"
    - row:
      - text: "Email"
      - text: "jane.customer@example.com"
    - row:
      - text: "Phone"
      - text: "+1 (555) 123-4567"
  - section "Identity documents":
    - row:
      - text: "Passport number"
      - text: "passport: A12345678"
    - row:
      - text: "NHS number"
      - text: "NHS: 943 476 5919"
    - row:
      - text: "Tax File Number"
      - text: "Tax File Number: 123 456 782"
    - row:
      - text: "Social Security Number"
      - text: "SSN: 123-45-6789"
  - section "Business":
    - row:
      - text: "Trading entity"
      - text: "ABN: 51 824 753 556"
    - row:
      - text: "Company number"
      - text: "ACN: 004 028 077"
  - section "Payment":
    - row:
      - text: "Card on file"
      - text: "Credit card: 4111 1111 1111 1111"
    - row:
      - text: "Bank account"
      - text: "IBAN: GB82 WEST 1234 5698 7654 32"
    - row:
      - text: "Routing"
      - text: "Routing: 021000021"
  - section "Connection details":
    - row:
      - text: "Last login from IP address"
      - text: "Server logged client connect from 192.168.1.42"
    - row:
      - text: "API request"
      - text: "Authorization: Basic dXNlcjpwYXNzd29yZA=="
```
